evidence_excerpt: After WSN was diagnosed no treatment was instituted and the patients are being monitored; the lesions were described as asymptomatic.

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: Lesions were asymptomatic and no systemic changes were reported; no treatment was required, suggesting no functional impairment in daily activities.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: Patients presented with asymptomatic rough, diffuse white patches; absence of pain noted.

notes_on_uncertainty: The case report does not provide documented follow-up outcomes beyond noting that no treatment was initiated and the patients were monitored. Long-term classifications are inferred from the asymptomatic presentation and observation-only management rather than explicit longitudinal data.
